tasks.name: Buy two different size M band T-shirts under $30 each and open the cart
tasks.description: Navigate the merch store, filter for size M T-shirts under $30, select the two cheapest distinct options, and open the cart page with both items added.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Store" link in the main navigation menu.
In the store categories, click on "Apparel" and then select the "T-Shirts" subcategory.
In the filters panel, open the size filter and select the "M" checkbox.
In the price filter, set the maximum price to "$30" and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown for the product list and select "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted list, click on the first T-shirt product card and on its product page click the "Add to cart" button with quantity left as 1.
Return to the T-shirt listing (using the breadcrumb or back button) and add the second T-shirt in the sorted list (a different design from the first) to the cart with quantity 1.
Click on the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header to open the cart summary page showing both selected T-shirts.

tasks.name: Play the most recent music video released after January 1, 2023 and add it to Favorites
tasks.description: Find the latest music video released on or after 2023-01-01, start playback, and add that video to a Favorites playlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Videos" or "Media" section in the main navigation.
Locate the sort control for videos and choose "Release Date: Newest First".
Scan the top of the video list and identify the first video whose displayed release date is on or after January 1, 2023, then click its thumbnail or title to open the video detail page.
On the video detail page, click the main play button to start playing the video.
Locate and click the "Add to playlist" or "Add to Favorites" button near the video player.

In the playlist selection dialog, select an existing playlist named "Favorites" if it is listed; if it is not listed, choose the option to create a new playlist, type "Favorites" as the name, and confirm.
Complete the action by confirming the add-to-playlist operation (e.g., clicking an "Add" or "Save" button) so that the current video is added to the "Favorites" playlist.

tasks.name: Create a 'Workout Mix' playlist with 5 songs (3–5 minutes) from at least 3 different albums
tasks.description: Build a new playlist named 'Workout Mix' containing exactly 5 tracks, each between 3 and 5 minutes long, with at least one track from each of the first three albums in the discography.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Music" or "Discography" section in the main navigation to view the list of albums.
Click on the first album cover in the album grid to open its tracklist page.
In the tracklist, find the first song whose duration is between 3:00 and 5:00 minutes and open its options menu (for example, by clicking a "⋮" or "More" button next to the track).
From the track options menu, select "Add to playlist", choose the option to create a new playlist, enter "Workout Mix" as the playlist name, and confirm.
Use the breadcrumb or a "Back to albums" link to return to the album grid and then click on the second album cover to open its tracklist.
On the second album’s tracklist, locate the first song with a duration between 3:00 and 5:00 minutes, open its options menu, choose "Add to playlist", and select the existing "Workout Mix" playlist.
Repeat the previous step for the third album in the album grid: open the third album, select one track between 3:00 and 5:00 minutes, and add it to the "Workout Mix" playlist.

After adding one qualifying track from each of the first three albums, open any album pages as needed and add two additional tracks with durations between 3:00 and 5:00 minutes to the "Workout Mix" playlist, stopping after you have added the fifth track in total, then navigate to the "Playlists" or "My Playlists" section and open the "Workout Mix" playlist page.

tasks.name: Select two second-cheapest tickets for a Los Angeles show in August 2025 and go to checkout
tasks.description: Find a Los Angeles tour date in August 2025, choose the second-cheapest ticket type available, select quantity 2, and proceed to the cart or checkout page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Tour" or "Live" link in the main navigation to open the tour dates page.
In the location or city filter, type "Los Angeles" and apply the filter so that only Los Angeles shows are listed.
Use the date filter controls to set the start date to August 1, 2025 and the end date to August 31, 2025, then apply the date filter.
From the filtered list of shows, click on the first listed show that takes place in August 2025 to open its event detail page.
On the event detail page, locate the ticket options list and, if available, use the sort control to sort ticket types by "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted ticket types list, click on the second item (the second-cheapest ticket option) to select that ticket type.
In the quantity or number-of-tickets input field, enter "2" as the quantity for the selected ticket type.
Click the "Add to cart", "Buy Tickets", or "Continue to checkout" button to proceed to the cart or checkout page with the two selected tickets.

tasks.name: Buy the digital version of 'Midnight Echoes' with the most tracks under $20
tasks.description: Compare the standard and deluxe editions of the 'Midnight Echoes' album and add the digital edition with more tracks to the cart, as long as its price is $20 or less; otherwise add the standard edition.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Store" link in the main navigation.
In the store categories, select "Music" to view music products.
Use the store search bar to type "Midnight Echoes" and submit the search.

In the search results, click on the product titled "Midnight Echoes (Standard Edition)" to open its product page, then scroll through the tracklist to review it and use the breadcrumb or back button to return to the search results.
From the search results, click on the product titled "Midnight Echoes (Deluxe Edition)" to open its product detail page.

On the deluxe edition product page, read the displayed price; if the price is $20.00 or less, click the "Add to cart" button for the deluxe digital edition; if the price is higher than $20.00, use the breadcrumb or back button to return to the search results and click "Add to cart" on the standard edition product instead.
Click on the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header to open the cart page showing the selected edition of "Midnight Echoes".

tasks.name: Subscribe to the band newsletter with weekly updates on tours, releases, and merch
tasks.description: Fill out the newsletter form using a sample email address, select at least three specific interest categories, and set the subscription frequency to weekly.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Scroll to the footer area and click on the "Newsletter" or "Sign up for updates" link.
In the signup form, click into the "Name" field and type "Alex Rivera".
Click into the "Email" field and type "alex.rivera@example.com".
In the interests or topics section of the form, select the checkboxes for "Tour announcements", "New music releases", and "Exclusive merch offers" (selecting all three).
If a region or country dropdown is present, open it and select "North America" (or the closest applicable region).
Open the "Email frequency" or "How often" dropdown and choose the "Weekly" option.
Click the "Subscribe" or "Sign Up" button at the bottom of the form to submit the newsletter subscription.

tasks.name: Save three 2024 'Tour Diary' blog posts and open one from your reading list
tasks.description: Filter the band’s blog for 'Tour Diary' posts from 2024, save the first three posts to a reading list or bookmarks, and then open one of the saved posts from that list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "News" or "Blog" section in the main navigation to open the blog index.
Locate the tag or category filter and select the tag labeled "Tour Diary".
Use the date or archive filter to choose the year "2024" and apply the filter so only 2024 posts are shown.
From the filtered list, click the bookmark icon, "Save", or "Add to reading list" control on the first listed post to save it.
Repeat the same save action for the second and third posts in the filtered list so that three posts from 2024 with the "Tour Diary" tag are saved.
Navigate to the "Reading List", "Saved Articles", or bookmarks section (via a profile menu, sidebar, or dedicated link).
Within the saved items, locate the first saved "Tour Diary" post from 2024 and click its title to open the full article page.

tasks.name: Build a vinyl + hoodie bundle under $100 and review it in the cart
tasks.description: Add one vinyl record priced at $40 or less and one hoodie priced at $60 or less to the cart, adjusting the hoodie choice if needed so that the cart subtotal does not exceed $100.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Store" link in the main navigation.
In the store categories, click on "Music" and use the format filter to select "Vinyl" so that only vinyl records are shown.

Use the price filter to set the maximum vinyl price to "$40" and apply it, then click on the third vinyl product in the filtered list to open its product page and click "Add to cart" with quantity set to 1.
Use the breadcrumb or navigation to return to the main store, then click on "Apparel" and choose the "Hoodies" subcategory.
Set the hoodies price filter to a maximum of "$60" and apply it, then use the sort dropdown to sort hoodies by "Price: High to Low".
From the sorted hoodies list, click on the first hoodie product (the most expensive within the filter) and add quantity 1 to the cart using the "Add to cart" button.

Click on the cart icon to open the full cart page and read the subtotal; if the subtotal is greater than $100, remove the current hoodie from the cart, return to the "Hoodies" category, select a different hoodie whose listed price is under $50, add it to the cart, and then reopen the cart page to review the adjusted bundle.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Store catalog items including apparel (T-shirts, hoodies) and music products (digital albums, vinyl).

fields.name: subtitle
fields.description: Edition or variant label, e.g., 'Standard Edition', 'Deluxe Edition'

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Top-level store category; aligns with store.html?categoryId values

fields.name: sizesAvailable
fields.description: For apparel; list of size codes such as 'xs','s','m','l','xl','xxl'

fields.name: trackCount
fields.description: Total tracks for album products, used to compare editions

fields.name: albumId
fields.description: Links music product to an Album

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart holding products and tickets for the single user.

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line items within the cart, referencing either store products or ticket types.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Snapshot of product or ticket name

fields.name: selectedSize
fields.description: Chosen apparel size for items like T-shirts or hoodies

fields.name: selectedFormat
fields.description: Chosen format for music products when applicable

entities.name: Order
entities.description: Finalized purchases created during checkout (merch and tickets).

fields.name: deliveryDetails
fields.description: Shipping address or note that delivery is digital

entities.name: OrderItem
entities.description: Snapshot of items purchased in an order, derived from the cart at checkout.

entities.name: Album
entities.description: Band albums and releases shown in the Discography section.

entities.name: Track
entities.description: Individual tracks belonging to albums, used for playback and playlists.

entities.name: Playlist
entities.description: Collections of tracks or videos such as 'Favorites' and 'Workout Mix'.

fields.name: isSystem
fields.description: True for built-in playlists like an initial 'Favorites'

entities.name: PlaylistItem
entities.description: Items in a playlist, referencing either tracks or videos.

entities.name: Video
entities.description: Music videos and other visual media available in the Videos section.

fields.name: releaseDate
fields.description: Used to sort and find most recent videos

entities.name: Event
entities.description: Tour dates and live shows listed on the Tour Dates page.

fields.name: eventDateTime
fields.description: Used for date range filtering (e.g., August 2025)

entities.name: TicketType
entities.description: Ticket options for an event, such as General Admission or VIP.

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Blog and news posts including 'Tour Diary' entries.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: List of tag labels such as 'Tour Diary'

entities.name: ReadingList
entities.description: Container for saved articles (bookmarks), e.g., a default 'Reading List'.

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True for the main saved articles list

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Saved article entries within a reading list.

entities.name: NewsletterSubscription
entities.description: Captured newsletter signups including interests, region, and frequency.
